strategy: 2 feed + 1 reel + 3 stories = 6 pieces/day. Slow living, not content factory.

slots.markets_hit: US morning (7AM EST) + UK lunch (12PM GMT)
slots.purpose: Morning ritual photo — coffee, journaling, golden light. Core pillar. Saves machine.

slots.markets_hit: US afternoon (1PM EST) + UK evening (6PM GMT)
slots.purpose: OOTD / thrift find / styled look. Visual hook + save-worthy styling tips.
Aesthetic vibe reel — rainy window, cooking, market, golden hour. Ken Burns + lo-fi music.
Story: day-in-the-life moment. Freelance desk, cafe work, errands. Relatable authenticity.
Story: evening tarot/oracle card pull. Poll sticker. Comments driver.
Story: cozy evening aesthetic. Reading, fairy lights, tea. Wind-down content.

caption_rules.tone: Warm older sister. Not preachy. Not try-hard. Feels like a text from your coolest friend.
caption_rules.avoid: Hustle culture, aggressive CTA, luxury flex, AI disclosure in character, brand jargon
voice_examples: If you need a sign to cancel your evening plans and just read a book — this is it.
Found this jacket for $15 at a thrift store. Best outfits tell a story.
The goal isn't to get everything done perfectly. The goal is grace.
